title: fix: install monorepo deps for app deploys
author: ElliotEtag
pr_body_excerpt: - Installs root workspace dependencies when an app references ../../packages/*\n- Fixes model-monitor deploys after moving to @pollinations/sdk/@pollinations/ui source builds\n- Verified with bash -n and local model-monitor production build

gist.headline: Fixing the Assembly Line
gist.blurb: Fixed a deployment hiccup where apps weren't grabbing their monorepo dependencies. The assembly line is back to humming smoothly!
gist.summary: Updated the app deployment script to correctly install root workspace dependencies when an app references local packages.
gist.impact: Internal apps like the model-monitor will now deploy successfully when using source builds from @pollinations/sdk and @pollinations/ui.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee fixing a conveyor belt or assembly line (representing CI/CD or deployment) with a wrench, assisted by the monitor robot.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny hard hat, using a wrench to fix a glowing lime green (#ecf874) conveyor belt carrying small boxes of code. A chunky monitor robot helps by holding a blueprint. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm.
